era: 1989-1996 core. Punk/Psych. E=6 -- escalation from E=5 at previous appearances. Punk skeleton revealed under psychedelic surface. U-District, Seattle.

theory_nodes.concept: Genre reframe Psychedelic Rock to Punk/Psych: the accumulated engine context reveals the punk skeleton underneath the psychedelic surface. Stooges Fun House in the DNA alongside psychedelia.
theory_nodes.description: Third appearance enables the reframe. The punk skeleton was always there; the engine's accumulated context makes it visible.

theory_nodes.concept: Third appearance: three views of one band across degrees 221, 233, 299. Most fully documented U-District band in the engine.
theory_nodes.description: 78-degree span, three appearances, one band. The most complete U-District documentation in the engine.

theory_nodes.concept: Sub Pop double-return at 299-300: Love Battery (299) and Pond (300). Infrastructure transition from C/Z (297-298) to Sub Pop (299-300) mirrors historical transition.
theory_nodes.description: C/Z to Sub Pop transition at the five-sixths mark approach.

cross_references.relationship: First appearance E=5, Psychedelic Rock. U-District enters. FIRST ACCIPITRIDAE pair.
Second appearance E=5, Psych Rock return. Sub Pop context deepened.
Sub Pop cluster closes. Five-sixths mark. E=6 held through 299-300.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=6 + E=6 = E=12. Sub Pop punk/psych meets the great owl's multi-night hooting battle. Both sustained at medium-high engagement. One degree from the five-sixths mark.
